name: Claude CLI Pi
description: A Pi 5 that boots into a tmux session running Claude Code CLI. Headless; SSH in to talk to Claude. Designed as a personal AI scratch-pad / always-on agent host.

env_required.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env_required.notes: Stored in the Ark vault and baked into /etc/claude-cli.env at install time. Never logged.

services.description: Always-on tmux session running Claude Code CLI; SSH in then `tmux attach -t claude`

post_install_message:
After flash + boot:
  1) ssh claude@<pi>.local
  2) tmux attach -t claude
  3) you're inside Claude Code; Ctrl-b d to detach without killing it
  4) ssh logout disconnects you; tmux session keeps running
authorization_notice: Requires an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY billed to your Anthropic account. Approve in your Anthropic dashboard before flashing. Do not share API keys in chat logs or commit them to git.
